channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: J.P. Morgan Called a Potential Elon Musk SpaceX-Tesla Merger "Strategically Coherent"
item.description: J.P. Morgan just outlined why a SpaceX-Tesla merger could make strategic sense on paper. It also got into why investors shouldn't mistake that for a likely deal.

item.title: Tesla’s Profit Per Vehicle Has Been Dropping Significantly
item.description: I just saw the headline “Tesla’s profit per vehicle drops 40%, within Toyota’s striking range.” Now, I’m not sure why this came out as news at the moment, as it’s been a while since Tesla’s 2025 financials came out, but I didn’t remember the company’s profit per vehicle declining so ... [contin...

item.title: Tesla merger with SpaceX won't save investors, top analyst says
item.description: Tesla investors who have bet on Elon Musk and his electric vehicle company have been rewarded for their faith time and again. The stock seems immune to prolonged downturns, even when Tesla (TSLA) fails to deliver on one of Musk's grandiose promises. And when he does deliver, the stock also pushes...

item.title: Goldman Sachs’ Insane SpaceX AI Forecast Has One Clear Winner: Micron Technology
item.description: Goldman Sachs just released a SpaceX forecast so staggering it borders on science fiction, and buried inside its assumptions is a quiet argument for one semiconductor company that keeps the entire AI industry running.

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Hubs Start Installing Car Cleaning Robots
item.description: Tesla Robotaxi Hubs Start Installing Car Cleaning Robots

item.title: Tesla And The Emperor's New Clothes
Don't Want Tesla or SpaceX in Your Portfolio? Meet the New 'Ex-Elon' ETFs
item.description: Two proposed exchange-traded funds (ETFs) aim to give investors exposure to the Nasdaq-100 and S&P 500 while excluding companies founded, controlled or led by Elon Musk. ‘Ex-Elon’ ETFs Target Tesla, SpaceX Subversive Markets Lab LLC filed with the SEC to...

item.title: Elon Musk Says Tesla Robot Will Be ‘Biggest Product of All Time’ — ‘Nothing Will Even Be Close’ but China Is Toughest Rival, ‘No Two Ways About It’
item.description: The next product race may not be fought on the highway. If Tesla and Space X CEO Elon Musk is right, it will play out on factory floors, in warehouses and eventually inside homes, where humanoid robots could become as...

item.title: Should You Buy Tesla, Inc. (TSLA)’s Shares?
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the 10 Best Stocks to Buy in 2026 According to Billionaire D.E. Shaw.

item.title: SpaceX reveals Starship Flight 13 launch date
item.description: SpaceX is preparing for the 13th integrated flight test of its Starship system, with a targeted launch as early as Thursday, July 16. The 90-minute launch window opens at 5:45 p.m. CT from Starbase in South Texas.

item.title: Largest Supercharger in Canada just had it's grand opening event. 44 stalls @ 325 kW each
item.description: Located in Ajax, ON, it's in one of the largest retail plazas in the GTA with plenty of retail and restaurants in the area. submitted by /u/redkulat [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Faces New Robotaxi Safety Questions From Federal Regulators
item.description: Federal regulators have raised new safety concerns about how autonomous vehicles interact with first responders, adding pressure on Tesla's robotaxi ambitions. The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration, several U.S. Senators, and some states are evaluating tighter rules and potential lim...

item.title: Tesla Cybercab Will Let You Change Air Vent Direction From the App
item.description: Tesla Cybercab Will Let You Change Air Vent Direction From the App

item.title: Tesla claims Cybercab driving employees at Giga Texas — in a parking lot
item.description: Tesla says “Cybercab employee rides at Giga Texas” are “starting soon” — its first stated step toward putting people inside the wheel-less, pedal-less robotaxi. But the announcement, spread across two Tesla accounts and roughly 2.9 million combined views, is thinner than it sounds. It’s not clear...

item.title: Tesla to Start Fully Autonomous Cybercab Employee Rides Soon
item.description: Tesla to Start Fully Autonomous Cybercab Employee Rides Soon

item.title: NVIDA Vs. Tesla: Tesla Jumps as It Finally Fulfills Decade-Old Promise So Buy Nvidia Instead
item.description: Tesla just made its decade-old robotaxi promise real on the streets of Dallas and Houston, while Nvidia quietly posted numbers that rewrote what an AI business looks like. The question is which story you are actually paying for at today's prices.

item.title: Waymo Expands Into Germany & Tesla Pumping Up Production While Volkswagen In Crisis
item.description: The auto industry news of the week has to be Volkswagen’s apparent crisis and plan to cut four factories, half of its models, and about 100,000 employees. So, when I saw other news coming out of Germany, I had to think about Volkswagen and what it’s been lacking, or has ... [continued] The post...

item.title: Forget AI Hyperscalers: Tesla May Own the Most Valuable AI Application
item.description: While investors fixate on Tesla's vehicle deliveries and margins, a quieter transformation is underway that positions the company to compete directly with the hyperscalers reshaping the global economy.

item.title: Tesla Releases Impact Report for 2025
item.description: Tesla Releases Impact Report for 2025

item.title: Tesla to Launch Vehicle Rentals in 4 More U.S. States
item.description: Tesla to Launch Vehicle Rentals in 4 More U.S. States

item.title: If You Have $1,000 to Invest in EV Stocks, Should It Go to Tesla or Rivian?
item.description: Both stocks have underperformed broader equities this year, but there may be plenty of upside ahead.

item.title: Has Meta ever had a stock split? What sets this ‘Mag 7’ stock apart
item.description: Meta Platforms has a lot in common with its “Magnificent 7” brethren. Like Nvidia, Apple, Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon, and Tesla, Meta is a technology giant with a market capitalization exceeding $1 trillion. Its stock has dramatically outperformed the broader S&P 500 over the past decade, and ...

item.title: Cybercab employee rides at Giga Texas starting soon
item.description: https://x.com/Tesla/status/2075729899130937347?s=20 submitted by /u/rcnfive [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla Reportedly Pushes Staff Toward Grok 4.5 As AI Spending Cap Takes Effect
item.description: Elon Musk told Tesla staff to adopt Grok 4.5 wherever possible, citing its significantly lower token costs compared to competing models, The Information reported.

item.title: End of an era: Decommissioning the original Model S & X assembly line in just 46 days
item.description: submitted by /u/rcnfive [link] [comments]

item.title: Waymo, Tesla must fix a dangerous issue with their robotaxis, NHTSA says
item.description: The future of U.S. roadways will feature a lot more automated vehicles, so the country must work out the kinks now before the AV population starts really increasing. One of the biggest issues already poking its head through is the multiple instances of automated vehicles driving through or ...

item.title: Tesla Tears Down Model S/X Line In Just 46 Days For Optimus Production
item.description: Tesla posted a video on X capturing heavy machinery tearing out concrete trenches, removing robotic equipment and workers installing rebar for new flooring to pave the way toward humanoid robotics.

item.title: Tesla shows rapid teardown of Model S and X lines, paving the way for Optimus at Fremont
item.description: Tesla shared a striking video showcasing the decommissioning of the original Model S and Model X assembly line at its Fremont Factory in Northern California. Completed in just 46 days, the teardown involved heavy machinery dismantling concrete pits, removing robotic arms and conveyors, and cleari...

item.title: Subversive Capital files 'Ex-Elon' ETFs with the SEC that strip Tesla and SpaceX from the S&P 500 and Nasdaq-100
item.description: Two proposed index funds are banning Elon Musk’s businesses. Find out how these anti-Elon ETFs work and whether they’re a shrewd investment move.

item.title: Musk tells Tesla staff to switch to Grok — a model he admits is worse
item.description: Elon Musk told Tesla staff to move to using Grok, the AI model from his own xAI (now folded into SpaceX), according to a memo sent to employees on Friday. The push comes days after Tesla capped employee spending on third-party AI tools — and it lands even though Musk himself concedes Grok is not ...

item.title: Tesla Faces Possible Robotaxi Ban In New Jersey, But It Gains Market Share In China
item.description: A New Jersey bill would ban self-driving cars that don't use radar and lidar. Tesla's stock is up 1% on Friday.

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Waiting For Godot
item.description: More robo-taxis would give Tesla stock a boost. Scaling the self-driving taxi business, however, has been harder than investors expect.

item.title: Tesla's 6-Seat Model Y L Spotted in Germany Ahead of European Launch
item.description: Tesla's 6-Seat Model Y L Spotted in Germany Ahead of European Launch

item.title: These are the top 10 best-selling EVs in the US so far in 2026
item.description: Tesla is still the king, accounting for about 50% of the US EV market, but a handful of brands are finally gaining traction with new models now on sale.

item.title: Gary Black Says Tesla's Valuation Is So 'Stretched' That Most Institutional Investors Won't Touch the Stock— and FSD Isn't Helping
item.description: Tesla Inc. faces institutional avoidance because investors see its stock as too expensive relative to expected profit growth, The Future Fund LLC’s Gary Black said, arguing that Full Self-Driving advantages alone are not enough to justify the valuation. Black Flags...

item.title: Tesla Starts Rolling Out FSD V14 Lite Internationally
item.description: Tesla Starts Rolling Out FSD V14 Lite Internationally

item.title: Elon Musk admits he was ‘clearly wrong’ about Anthropic
item.description: Elon Musk posted a candid admission on his social media platform X on June 9, declaring that he had been “clearly wrong” about Anthropic. The statement marked a notable reversal from his earlier skepticism toward the AI company. In September, Musk had written, “ Winning was never in the set of po...

item.title: Elon Musk SEC settlement raises 'red flags,' judge says
item.description: Being the richest person in world history comes with its own headaches, and Elon Musk has a migraine-sized one when it comes to his legal battles. Tesla is being sued for autopilot crashes, for misleading statements about Robotaxi, and for alleged workplace discrimination. Musk himself was recent...

item.title: New Jersey Bill Wants Tesla to Add More Sensors to Robotaxis
item.description: New Jersey Bill Wants Tesla to Add More Sensors to Robotaxis

item.title: Tesla analyst says Full Self-Driving is about to have its iPhone moment
item.description: A Tesla analyst believes the company’s Full Self-Driving suite is close to an “inflection point,” where people will finally realize that it is more than what it appears, similar to how many view the iPhone. Pierre Ferragu, an analyst who has covered Tesla for many years at New Street Research, sa...

item.title: Tesla Q2 Preview: Time Only Makes This Company Finer
Why Is Tesla Bringing the Long-Wheelbase Model Y to the US?
item.description: TSLA adds the long-wheelbase Model Y to the U.S., bringing a true three-row electric SUV with added space and premium features this fall.

item.title: Australia’s 7 best-selling EVs are now all Chinese — even Tesla’s
item.description: Australia just posted its biggest month ever for electric car sales, and for the first time seven different EVs each cleared 1,000 units in a single month. Every one of them is either Chinese-owned or Chinese-built — and that includes the Tesla Model Y that topped the chart, which rolls off the l...

item.title: Prediction: Tesla Stock Will Surprise Investors Over the Next 5 Years
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) just posted one of its cleanest quarters in years, and the market shrugged. Tesla grew Q1 2026 revenue 15.78% year over year to $22.387 billion, expanded automotive gross margin by 490 basis points to 21.1%, and grew free cash flow 117%. Yet shares are down 12.38% year to date...

item.title: Why Tesla Stock Can’t Get Out of Its Own Way
item.description: More robo-taxis would give Tesla stock a boost. Scaling the self-driving taxi business, however, has been harder than investors expect.

item.title: SpaceX Will Be ‘Worth More Than the Rest of Earth,’ Musk Says. How He Gets There.
item.description: This has been valuation week for SpaceX with more than a dozen analysts writing initial research following the company’s record-setting June IPO. Investors have had a lot of estimates, price targets, bull cases, and bear cases to digest. SpaceX CEO Elon Musk also has a thought about SpaceX’s po...

item.title: Tesla Stock Chart Pattern Points to $759 — a 92% Move From Here
item.description: Tesla stock coils between a cup and handle and a triangle. A breakout above $470 could unlock a $759 TSLA target.

item.title: Rivian Automotive vs. Tesla: What Their Revenue Trends Tell Investors
item.description: Tesla's revenue towers over Rivian's, but one company shows steadier growth while the other fluctuates.

item.title: Tesla: A Pivot That Doesn't Fix The Price
Elon Musk Has Some Wild Thoughts About SpaceX’s Valuation
item.description: This has been valuation week for SpaceX with more than a dozen analysts writing initial research following the company’s record-setting June IPO. Investors have had a lot of estimates, price targets, bull cases, and bear cases to digest. SpaceX CEO Elon Musk also has a thought about SpaceX’s po...
